channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Homeowners are holding onto their houses for a record-long stretch
item.description: Data: ATTOM ; Chart: Axios Visuals U.S. homeowners are staying in their houses for the longest time in at least 25 years, largely thanks to their low ...

item.title: Seattle Seahawks dominate Patriots 29-13 to win Super Bowl LX
item.description: Seattle Seahawks head coach Mike Macdonald is shown after being doused with Gatorade, after Seattle defeated the New England Patriots 29-13 in Super B...

item.title: A day of highs and lows for Team USA
item.description: A Sunday that began with Lindsey Vonn's screams of pain after crashing in the downhill ended with cheers of jubilation as Team USA edged out Japan for...

item.title: People are using AI for legal advice and it's driving lawyers bananas
item.description: AI promises to make work more productive for lawyers, but there's a problem: Their clients are using it, too. Why it matters: The rise of AI is creati...

item.title: Crypto revolt exposes fragility of Trump's coalition
item.description: Trillions of dollars in value have been vaporized from global crypto markets since October, plunging an ascendant industry championed by President Tru...

item.title: Epstein’s lawyers asked CIA for records that could show affiliation with agency
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein’s lawyers filed records requests to the National Security Agency and the CIA, according to documents released by the Justice Departmen...

item.title: On the ballot for the first time, the former RNC chairman competes in N.C.
item.description: Michael Whatley was selected for Post Next 50.

item.title: How two Bernie Sanders allies are trying to counter the online right
item.description: More Perfect Union, one of the fastest-growing YouTube channels, doesn’t look like most other online political content.

item.title: A Republican lawmaker embarks on his biggest showdown yet with Trump
item.description: Thomas Massie has challenged Trump on issues including the Epstein files and is trying to survive reelection in deep-red Kentucky.

item.title: Trump leaves Republicans guessing on midterms plans as outlook darkens
item.description: The president is said to be eager to increase his involvement but has yet to approve a spending plan for his $300 million-plus war chest.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trump’s economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
